mapper.select: SELECT c.code, c.name, c.pinned, c.pin_order, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.stock_code) AS stockCount, SUM(md.margin_balance) AS marginBalance, SUM(md.margin_change) AS marginChange, SUM(md.short_balance) AS shortBalance, SUM(md.short_change) AS shortChange, MAX(sc.snap_date) AS snapDate, CASE WHEN mkt.amount IS NOT NULL AND mkt.amount > 0 THEN ROUND(IFNULL(sid.amount, 0) / mkt.amount * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS volumePct FROM concept c LEFT JOIN stock_concept sc ON c.code = sc.concept_code AND sc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN margin_daily md ON sc.stock_code = md.stock_code AND md.is_deleted = 0 AND md.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND md.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) LEFT JOIN sector_index_daily sid ON c.code = sid.sector_code AND sid.sector_type = 'CONCEPT' AND sid.is_deleted = 0 AND sid.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sid.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(amount) AS amount FROM market_index_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) ) mkt ON 1=1 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') GROUP BY c.code, c.name, c.pinned, c.pin_order, mkt.amount ORDER BY c.pinned DESC, c.pin_order ASC, ${sortBy} ${sortDir} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM concept c LEFT JOIN stock_concept sc ON c.code = sc.concept_code AND sc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN margin_daily md ON sc.stock_code = md.stock_code AND md.is_deleted = 0 AND md.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND md.trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0) WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM concept WHERE is_deleted = 0
